name: SCN5A 400kb TAD (ENCODE K562 CTCF + K562 H3K27ac)
description: 400kb window spanning the SCN5A cardiac sodium channel locus on chr3p22.2. CTCF sites from ENCODE K562 ChIP-seq (ENCFF736NYC, ENCSR000DWE), IDR narrowPeak, GRCh38. H3K27ac enhancer peaks from ENCODE K562 (ENCFF864OSZ, ENCSR000AKP). LIMITATION: K562 is an erythroid leukemia cell line, not cardiac — SCN5A is primarily expressed in cardiomyocytes. K562 H3K27ac may underrepresent cardiac-specific enhancers. iPSC-CM Hi-C data (not available in ENCODE) would be the biologically relevant reference for SCN5A. CTCF sites are largely cell-type invariant (Cuddapah 2009, PMID:19030024); K562 CTCF is expected to reflect cardiac CTCF binding at most sites. SCN5A (NM_198056.3) is on the MINUS strand; TSS is at 38649687 (txEnd). SCN10A, a neighboring sodium channel gene, lies ~47kb downstream.

enhancers.name: ACVR2B_promoter_H3K27ac
enhancers.note: K562 H3K27ac peak cluster at ACVR2B promoter. Peak_11515 (38454074-38455388, signal=19.45) and adjacent Peak_37979 (38453284-38453601, signal=5.75). Strongest H3K27ac in window. Co-localizes with CTCF cluster (38479940-38482274). ACVR2B (activin receptor type 2B) is a TGF-beta superfamily receptor. MANUALLY CALIBRATED occupancy from signal intensity

enhancers.name: EXOG_promoter_H3K27ac
enhancers.note: K562 H3K27ac peak at EXOG promoter region (Peak_14358, 38496381-38496904, signal=15.19). Co-localizes with strongest CTCF in window (38496125-38496384, signal=226.16). EXOG encodes mitochondrial endo/exonuclease. MANUALLY CALIBRATED occupancy from signal

enhancers.name: SCN5A_TSS_H3K27ac
enhancers.note: K562 H3K27ac peak near SCN5A TSS (Peak_34818, 38649827-38650307, signal=5.98). SCN5A is on minus strand, TSS at 38649687. Weak signal expected in K562 (erythroid, not cardiac). Co-localizes with strong CTCF cluster at SCN5A promoter. LIMITATION: cardiac-specific enhancers likely underrepresented in K562

ctcf_sites.name: ACVR2B_upstream_CTCF
ctcf_sites.note: K562 signal=123.47 (38479940-38480104). Near ACVR2B gene body. Co-localizes with weaker CTCF at 38482139 (signal=9.26)

ctcf_sites.name: EXOG_boundary_CTCF
ctcf_sites.note: STRONGEST CTCF in window. K562 signal=226.16 (38496125-38496384). At EXOG promoter, co-localizes with H3K27ac (signal=15.19). Candidate sub-TAD boundary between ACVR2B and EXOG/SCN5A domains

ctcf_sites.name: EXOG_intragenic_CTCF
ctcf_sites.note: K562 signal=165.90 (38521471-38521668). Within EXOG gene body. Second strongest CTCF in window

ctcf_sites.name: EXOG_SCN5A_intergenic_CTCF
ctcf_sites.note: K562 signal=21.37 (38528505-38528775). Between EXOG 3-prime end and SCN5A 3-prime end (minus strand)

ctcf_sites.name: SCN5A_intragenic_CTCF_1
ctcf_sites.note: Weak K562 signal=11.43 (38558924-38559194). Within SCN5A gene body (intron region)

ctcf_sites.name: SCN5A_intragenic_CTCF_2
ctcf_sites.note: K562 signal=38.76 (38560478-38560748). Within SCN5A gene body. ~1.5kb from SCN5A_intragenic_CTCF_1, possible tandem pair

ctcf_sites.name: SCN5A_intragenic_CTCF_3
ctcf_sites.note: K562 signal=63.09 (38623663-38623933). Within SCN5A gene body. May function as intragenic insulator

ctcf_sites.name: SCN5A_promoter_proximal_CTCF
ctcf_sites.note: K562 signal=178.31 (38628053-38628247). Third strongest CTCF in window. ~22kb from SCN5A TSS (minus strand). Likely promoter-proximal regulatory element

ctcf_sites.name: SCN5A_TSS_CTCF_1
ctcf_sites.note: K562 signal=72.79 (38646638-38646908). ~3kb from SCN5A TSS (38649687). Part of promoter CTCF cluster

ctcf_sites.name: SCN5A_TSS_CTCF_2
ctcf_sites.note: SECOND STRONGEST CTCF in window. K562 signal=306.80 (38651268-38651531). ~1.7kb downstream of SCN5A TSS. Co-localizes with H3K27ac (signal=5.98). Strong candidate for promoter-associated insulator element

ctcf_sites.name: SCN5A_downstream_CTCF_1
ctcf_sites.note: K562 signal=56.17 (38655758-38656028). ~6kb downstream of SCN5A TSS

ctcf_sites.name: SCN5A_downstream_CTCF_2
ctcf_sites.note: K562 signal=59.22 (38662666-38662936). ~13kb downstream of SCN5A TSS

ctcf_sites.name: SCN5A_SCN10A_intergenic_CTCF
ctcf_sites.note: K562 signal=58.77 (38707801-38708071). In intergenic region between SCN5A and SCN10A (~58kb from SCN5A TSS, ~11kb upstream of SCN10A)

ctcf_sites.name: SCN10A_intragenic_CTCF
ctcf_sites.note: K562 signal=107.00 (38738705-38738975). Within SCN10A gene body. Fourth strongest CTCF in window

ctcf_chipseq_k562.note: Same K562 CTCF source used for TP53, BRCA1, MLH1, LDLR. CTCF binding is largely cell-type invariant (Cuddapah 2009, PMID:19030024). Expected to reflect cardiac CTCF at most positions

h3k27ac_chipseq_k562.note: LIMITATION: K562 is erythroid, not cardiac. Only 4 H3K27ac peaks in 400kb window (vs 7-14 for other loci). SCN5A is primarily expressed in cardiomyocytes, so K562 H3K27ac severely underrepresents cardiac-specific regulatory elements. iPSC-CM or primary cardiac tissue H3K27ac data would be the appropriate reference

gene_annotations.note: Gene coordinates represent the union of all curated transcript isoforms (min txStart to max txEnd). SCN5A coordinates based on NM_198056.3 (major cardiac isoform). SCN10A extends beyond the 400kb window (to 38816217)

_thresholds_note: Not calibrated for 400x400 matrix. SSIM thresholds require empirical calibration after first SCN5A ARCHCODE run. Matrix-size dilution expected (400 bins, same as BRCA1). Additional limitation: K562 H3K27ac may produce incomplete enhancer landscape for this cardiac gene.
